FOOTER.INFORMATIONS_CONTENT: With us, your journey will be comfortable, safe, and tailored to your wishes – anywhere in Slovenia or Europe.
FOOTER.COMPANY_DATA: © 2025 Toman d.o.o. - Posavec 131, 4244 Podnart, Slovenia - VAT number: SI95427201

HERO.TITLE: Transportation at a higher level
HERO.CONTENT_FIRST: Premium vehicles and experienced chauffeurs for a seamless travel experience, where every detail is carefully considered.
HERO.CONTENT_SECOND: We combine reliability, discretion, and comfort into a service designed for clients who expect more than just getting from point A to point B.

WHO_WE_ARE.TITLE: Discreet and seamless travel
WHO_WE_ARE.SUBTITLE: Who We Are
WHO_WE_ARE.CONTENT_1: Every journey is a carefully planned experience where comfort, discretion, and precision come first. With experienced chauffeurs and premium vehicles, we ensure a smooth and flawless ride, regardless of the occasion. Our service is tailored to your pace and expectations, so you can travel relaxed and without unnecessary concerns.
WHO_WE_ARE.CONTENT_2: For a tailored offer, we are at your disposal – simply contact us in the way that suits you best.

SERVICES.TITLE: Transfers tailored to your pace and requirements
SERVICES.SUBTITLE: Our services

FIRST.TITLE: Business and corporate transfers
FIRST.CONTENT: Discreet and reliable service for companies, meetings, and business events.

SECOND.TITLE: VIP and private transfers
SECOND.CONTENT: Comfort, discretion, and full flexibility for the most demanding clients.

THIRD.TITLE: Events and special occasions
THIRD.CONTENT: Transfers for gala evenings, weddings, and exclusive events.

FOURTH.TITLE: Premium group transfers
FOURTH.CONTENT: Comfortable, organized travel for small and large groups at a higher standard.

FIFTH.TITLE: Long-distance transfers across Slovenia and Europe
FIFTH.CONTENT: Reliable and comfortable journeys over longer distances without stress.

SIXTH.TITLE: Tailor-made transfers
SIXTH.CONTENT: Fully customized transport solutions based on your schedule, wishes, and requirements.

BUS_SECTION.TITLE: Comfortable and reliable group travel
BUS_SECTION.SUBTITLE: Coach transfers
BUS_SECTION.CONTENT_1: We organize modern bus transfers for groups of all sizes – from excursions and events to business and school trips. Our fleet ensures a comfortable, safe, and efficient journey tailored to your needs and schedule.
BUS_SECTION.CONTENT_2: With experienced drivers and well-planned organization, we make sure every trip runs smoothly and without stress. For more information or a tailored offer, feel free to contact us – we will be happy to assist you.

FLEET.TITLE: When the vehicle becomes part of the experience
FLEET.SUBTITLE: Our Fleet

C_CLASS.NAME: Mercedes-Benz C-Class
C_CLASS.DESCRIPTION: The Mercedes-Benz C-Class with AMG styling combines sporty elegance with premium comfort. Its refined interior and dynamic ride make it ideal for business transfers, individual transport, or stylish occasions where making an impression matters.

V_CLASS.NAME: Mercedes-Benz V-Class
V_CLASS.DESCRIPTION: The extended Mercedes-Benz V-Class offers exceptional space and flexibility for up to 7 passengers. With comfortable seating, a luxurious interior, and modern features, it's the perfect choice for business trips, family outings, or VIP transfers. This van blends elegance with practicality to ensure a high level of comfort on every journey.

LION_COACH_1.NAME: MAN Lionʼs Coach
LION_COACH_1.DESCRIPTION: Experience modern comfort with our newer MAN Lion’s Coach. Featuring 51+1+1 seats, it’s an excellent choice for larger groups seeking space and reliability. The coach is equipped with air conditioning, a TV, and a refrigerator to ensure a smooth and pleasant journey. Ideal for both long-distance trips and corporate or day tours.

LION_COACH_2.NAME: MAN Lionʼs Coach
LION_COACH_2.DESCRIPTION: Experience the pinnacle of luxury travel with our Man Lion's Coach. With 49+1 seats, this coach offers ample space for a comfortable journey. Enjoy onboard amenities such as a TV, toilete, air conditioning, and a refrigerator. Whether it's a corporate event, airport transfer, or group excursion, our Man Lion's Coach ensures a seamless and lavish travel experience.

TRAVEGO.NAME: Mercedes-Benz Travego
TRAVEGO.DESCRIPTION: Embark on a remarkable journey with our Mercedes Benz Travego. Designed to accommodate 51+2 passengers, this coach combines elegance and functionality. Stay entertained with the onboard TV, relax in the refreshing air-conditioned environment, and keep your refreshments cool in the refrigerator. Whether it's a long-distance trip or a sightseeing tour, our Mercedes Benz Travego guarantees a stylish and comfortable ride.

SETRA.NAME: Setra S 517 HD
SETRA.DESCRIPTION: Indulge in luxury and sophistication with our Setra S 517 HD coach. With seating for 57+2+1 passengers, this coach provides an abundance of space and comfort. Enjoy your favorite shows on the onboard TV, benefit from the convenience of a toilete, and experience a pleasant journey with the climate control and refrigerator. Whether it's a special event or a group excursion, our Setra S 517 HD ensures a first-class travel experience.

BUSINESS_PARTNERS.TITLE: Trusted by companies and private clients
BUSINESS_PARTNERS.SUBTITLE: VIP and corporate travel across Slovenia and Europe

PRIVACY_POLICY.SUBTITLE: Legal Policies
PRIVACY_POLICY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY_POLICY.SECTION_CONTENT_FIRST: TOMAN Transport Ltd. respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy informs you about how we handle your personal information when you visit our website (regardless of where you visit it from) and informs you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SECTION_CONTENT_SECOND: During the use of our website, we may ask you to provide certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you. Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to, your name, address, email address, and phone number. We use this data to improve our services, respond to your inquiries, process your orders, and comply with legal obligations.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SECTION_CONTENT_THIRD: We may disclose your personal data to third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing, order fulfillment, or data analysis. All third-party service providers must take appropriate security measures to protect your personal data.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SECTION_CONTENT_FORTH: We have implemented appropriate security measures to prevent accidental loss, use, or unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure of your personal data.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SECTION_CONTENT_FIFTH: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also object to the processing of your personal data under certain circumstances.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SECTION_CONTENT_SIXTH: Any changes we make to our privacy policy in the future will be posted on this page. Please check regularly for any updates or changes to our privacy policy.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SECTION_CONTENT_SEVENTH: If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy, please contact us at

ABOUT_US.CONTENT_FIRST: Toman d.o.o. is a company specialized in providing high-quality bus and VIP transportation services for individuals both in Slovenia and abroad. With a solid foundation established in 2012, we constantly adapt and develop to meet the ever-changing needs of our esteemed customers.
ABOUT_US.CONTENT_SECOND: Over the years, the company has experienced remarkable growth, solidifying its position as one of the most trusted providers of transportation services. By investing in the modernization of our fleet, we ensure that our vehicles meet the highest quality standards and comply with demanding environmental regulations. Our commitment to sustainability intertwines with our dedication to providing safe, efficient, and environmentally friendly transportation solutions.
ABOUT_US.CONTENT_THIRD: We take great pride in our team of experienced and professional drivers. Each member of our staff is carefully selected and trained to deliver a superior level of service. Their expertise, combined with a friendly and accommodating approach, ensures a pleasant and comfortable journey for every passenger. We understand that the role of a driver extends beyond simple transportation; they serve as ambassadors of our company, representing our values and commitment to customer satisfaction.
ABOUT_US.CONTENT_FORTH: Throughout these years, our commitment to excellence has gained the trust and loyalty of numerous customers. We are proud that many of our clients return to us time and time again, relying on our services with confidence. Additionally, we are honored to have established strong collaborations with reputable international partners. These partnerships have been built on mutual respect, shared values, and recognition of the quality and reliability of our company.
ABOUT_US.CONTENT_FIFTH: As we look towards the future, we remain committed to pushing the boundaries of excellence in the transportation industry. We will continue to invest in our fleet, explore innovative approaches, and expand our network to better serve our customers. Our vision is to become one of the top choices for individuals seeking safe, efficient, and environmentally friendly transportation services.

CONTACT_US.SUBTITLE: Get In Touch
CONTACT_US.TITLE: Contact Us
CONTACT_US.DISCLAIMER: Sending an inquiry does not constitute a reservation of the transfer. The reservation is valid only upon confirmation of the prepared offer via email by the client.
